_meta.title: QueueStorm Investigator — Hard Test Case Pack
_meta.description: 100 challenging test cases covering all case types, bilingual input, adversarial prompts, edge cases, and ambiguous evidence. Expected outputs are generated by the deterministic rule engine.
how_to_use: Run scripts/run_hard_tests.py against your deployed endpoint.
Each case's expected_output is the reference; your service must return the same relevant_transaction_id, evidence_verdict, case_type, and department.

input.complaint: I accidentally sent 3000 taka to the wrong number just now. I meant to send it to my friend but I typed the wrong digits.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 3000 BDT via TXN-H001 to the wrong recipient. Amount and timing align with the transaction.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-H001 with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-H001. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: I sent 1500 to the wrong person by mistake. Please reverse it.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a transfer that was not received, but the provided history contains multiple/no matching transactions, so the exact transaction cannot be confirmed.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Ask the customer for the recipient's number to identify the correct transaction. Do not initiate a dispute until the transaction is confirmed.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We see more than one transaction that could match. Could you share the recipient's number so we can identify the right transaction? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Payment failed – mobile recharge balance deducted

input.complaint: I tried to recharge my Grameenphone number for 500 taka but the app showed an error. But my balance was reduced!

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 500 BDT payment (TXN-H140) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the ledger status of TXN-H140. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the standard reversal flow within SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-H140 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: My electricity bill payment of 1800 taka failed but money was taken from my account.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 1800 BDT payment (TXN-H150) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the ledger status of TXN-H150. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the standard reversal flow within SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-H150 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: My payment failed but balance was deducted. I have no transaction ID.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a an unspecified amount payment (None) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the ledger status of None. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the standard reversal flow within SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction None may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: আমার ১২০০ টাকার পেমেন্ট ব্যর্থ হয়েছে কিন্তু ব্যালেন্স কেটে নিয়েছে।

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 1200 BDT payment (TXN-H160) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the ledger status of TXN-H160. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the standard reversal flow within SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: লেনদেন TXN-H160 এ অপ্রত্যাশিত ব্যালেন্স কাটার বিষয়টি আমরা লক্ষ্য করেছি। আমাদের পেমেন্ট টিম বিষয়টি যাচাই করবে এবং প্রযোজ্য কোনো অর্থ অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলের মাধ্যমে ফেরত দেওয়া হবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

cases.label: Payment failed – multiple failed payments same merchant

input.complaint: I tried to pay 700 taka but it failed twice and both times money was deducted.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a duplicate payment; two identical payments appear in history. TXN-H181 is the likely duplicate and needs biller verification.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate with payments_ops. If the biller confirms a single charge, initiate reversal of TXN-H181.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted the possible duplicate payment for transaction TXN-H181. Our payments team will verify with the biller and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Phishing – OTP request via phone call

input.complaint: Someone called me saying they are from bKash customer care and asked for my OTP to verify my account. I haven't shared it. Is this real?

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports an unsolicited contact attempting to obtain credentials (OTP/PIN). Likely social engineering; no transaction involved.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to the fraud_risk team. Confirm to the customer that the company never asks for OTP/PIN, and log the reported contact for fraud pattern analysis.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances, even if someone claims to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances, even if someone claims to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Agent cash-in – pending not reflected in balance

input.complaint: I deposited 3000 taka through an agent this morning but my balance has not been updated yet.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 3000 BDT payment (TXN-H340) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the ledger status of TXN-H340. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the standard reversal flow within SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-H340 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Refund – change of mind, completed payment

expected_output.recommended_next_action: Inform the customer that refund eligibility depends on the merchant's policy and guide them on contacting the merchant directly.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Refunds for completed merchant payments depend on the merchant's own policy. We recommend contacting the merchant directly, and if you need help reaching them, please reply and we will guide you. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Vague – something is wrong with my money

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a concern without enough detail to identify a specific transaction. Clarification is required before any action.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Reply to the customer requesting specifics: transaction ID, amount, what went wrong, and approximate time.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help you faster, please share the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports an unsolicited contact attempting to obtain credentials (OTP/PIN). Likely social engineering; no transaction involved.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Escalate to the fraud_risk team. Confirm to the customer that the company never asks for OTP/PIN, and log the reported contact for fraud pattern analysis.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out before sharing any information. We never ask for your PIN, OTP, or password under any circumstances, even if someone claims to be from us. Our fraud team has been notified of this incident. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer requests a refund of an unspecified amount for None. Appears to be a change-of-mind request rather than a service failure.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Inform the customer that refund eligibility depends on the merchant's policy and guide them on contacting the merchant directly.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Refunds for completed merchant payments depend on the merchant's own policy. We recommend contacting the merchant directly, and if you need help reaching them, please reply and we will guide you. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

expected_output.recommended_next_action: Ask the customer for the recipient's number to identify the correct transaction. Do not initiate a dispute until the transaction is confirmed.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. We see more than one transaction that could match. Could you share the recipient's number so we can identify the right transaction? Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Edge case – amount in Bangla digits

input.complaint: আমি ভুলে ৩৫০০ টাকা ভুল নম্বরে পাঠিয়েছি।

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 3500 BDT via TXN-H690 to the wrong recipient. Amount and timing align with the transaction.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-H690 with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
expected_output.customer_reply: আপনার লেনদেন TXN-H690 এর বিষয়ে আমরা অবগত হয়েছি। আমাদের ডিসপিউট টিম বিষয়টি যাচাই করে অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলে আপনার সাথে যোগাযোগ করবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

cases.label: Edge case – mixed case type (payment failed + refund)

input.complaint: My payment failed but money was deducted. Also I want a refund for an earlier payment.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 600 BDT payment (TXN-H700) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the ledger status of TXN-H700. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the standard reversal flow within SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted that transaction TXN-H700 may have caused an unexpected balance deduction. Our payments team will review the case and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Edge case – campaign context with phishing

input.complaint: Someone told me to send my OTP to get the campaign cashback. Is this real?

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a concern without enough detail to identify a specific transaction. Clarification is required before any action.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Reply to the customer requesting specifics: transaction ID, amount, what went wrong, and approximate time.
expected_output.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help you faster, please share the transaction ID, the amount involved, and a short description of what went wrong. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

input.complaint: My 4500 taka transfer went to the wrong account.

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports sending 4500 BDT via TXN-H710 to the wrong recipient. Amount and timing align with the transaction.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify TXN-H710 with the customer and initiate the wrong-transfer dispute workflow per policy.
expected_output.customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-H710. Our dispute team will review the case and contact you through official support channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.

cases.label: Edge case – no language hint, pure Bangla

input.complaint: আমার পেমেন্ট ব্যর্থ হয়েছে এবং টাকা কেটে নেওয়া হয়েছে। সাহায্য করুন।

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer attempted a 900 BDT payment (TXN-H720) that failed but reports the balance was deducted. Requires payments operations investigation.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Investigate the ledger status of TXN-H720. If the balance was deducted on a failed payment, initiate the standard reversal flow within SLA.
expected_output.customer_reply: লেনদেন TXN-H720 এ অপ্রত্যাশিত ব্যালেন্স কাটার বিষয়টি আমরা লক্ষ্য করেছি। আমাদের পেমেন্ট টিম বিষয়টি যাচাই করবে এবং প্রযোজ্য কোনো অর্থ অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলের মাধ্যমে ফেরত দেওয়া হবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।

cases.label: Edge case – unknown channel, duplicate payment with Bangla

input.complaint: দুইবার পেমেন্ট হয়ে গেছে। ৭৫০ টাকা দুইবার কেটেছে।

expected_output.agent_summary: Customer reports a duplicate payment; two identical payments appear in history. TXN-H731 is the likely duplicate and needs biller verification.
expected_output.recommended_next_action: Verify the duplicate with payments_ops. If the biller confirms a single charge, initiate reversal of TXN-H731.
expected_output.customer_reply: লেনদেন TXN-H731 এ সম্ভাব্য দ্বৈত পেমেন্টের বিষয়টি আমরা লক্ষ্য করেছি। আমাদের পেমেন্ট টিম যাচাই করবে এবং প্রযোজ্য কোনো অর্থ অফিসিয়াল চ্যানেলের মাধ্যমে ফেরত দেওয়া হবে। অনুগ্রহ করে কারো সাথে আপনার পিন বা ওটিপি শেয়ার করবেন না।
